rule: Rejected concepts recorded in this directory are permanent structural rejections under the current system state unless an explicit override record is authored.
prohibitions: Rejected concepts must not be reintroduced as fresh candidates without an explicit override artifact.
Rejected concepts must not be aliased into accepted concepts.
Rejected concepts must not be silently reinterpreted in runtime.
overrideRequirement: Any future reconsideration requires an explicit override artifact that names the rejected concept, states the reason for override, and supersedes the rejection record intentionally.
